channel.title: Free From the System
channel.description: The system is broken. Your health doesn't have to be. Evidence-based strategies for healthcare independence.

item.title: How to Leave Employer Health Insurance Without Losing Everything
item.description: A practical roadmap for transitioning away from employer-sponsored coverage while protecting your family's health and finances.

item.title: The Real Cost of Staying in the System
item.description: Most people calculate the cost of leaving traditional insurance. Few calculate the cost of staying.

item.title: Health Share Ministries Explained: What They Are and What They Aren't
item.description: A clear-eyed look at health-sharing ministries — the benefits, the limitations, and who they actually work for.

item.title: Direct Primary Care: The $75/Month Doctor Who Actually Knows Your Name
item.description: How DPC practices are rebuilding the doctor-patient relationship that insurance destroyed.

item.title: Why I Left My Corporate Health Plan
item.description: The numbers that convinced one family to walk away from a $24,000/year insurance plan.

item.title: The Open Enrollment Trap: Why Switching Plans Won't Fix the Problem
item.description: Every November, millions of Americans rearrange deck chairs on the Titanic.

item.title: Medical Tourism for Americans: A Complete Guide
item.description: From dental work in Mexico to surgery in Thailand — what's real, what's risky, and what saves 70%.

item.title: Cash Pay Surgery: How to Negotiate Hospital Bills Before the Scalpel
item.description: The price you're quoted and the price you can pay are rarely the same number.

item.title: Catastrophic Coverage Plus DPC: The Hybrid Model That Actually Works
item.description: Combining a high-deductible catastrophic plan with direct primary care creates something insurance companies don't want you to discover.

item.title: The COBRA Trap: Why Continuing Your Employer Plan Costs More Than You Think
item.description: COBRA continuation coverage sounds like a safety net. For most people, it's a financial noose.

item.title: Leaving the ACA Marketplace: When Subsidies Aren't Enough
item.description: Even with premium tax credits, marketplace plans can leave you with $8,000 deductibles and narrow networks.

item.title: How to Build a Healthcare Exit Strategy in 90 Days
item.description: A step-by-step timeline for transitioning from traditional insurance to alternative coverage.

item.title: The Self-Employed Health Insurance Dilemma
item.description: When your employer is also you, the healthcare math changes completely.

item.title: Why Young Families Are Abandoning Traditional Insurance
item.description: The generation that grew up watching their parents go bankrupt from medical bills is choosing differently.

item.title: Health Insurance vs. Health Care: They're Not the Same Thing
item.description: Somewhere along the way, Americans confused having insurance with having access to care.

item.title: The Freelancer's Guide to Healthcare Freedom
item.description: Gig workers and freelancers have more healthcare options than they realize.

item.title: Short-Term Health Plans: Bridge Coverage or Booby Trap?
item.description: Short-term plans fill a gap, but the fine print can leave you exposed.

item.title: Farm Bureau Health Plans: The Rural Alternative
item.description: In some states, Farm Bureau plans offer coverage outside ACA regulations.

item.title: How to Leave the System When You Have a Pre-Existing Condition
item.description: Pre-existing conditions make the exit harder but not impossible.

item.title: The Expat Health Insurance Option
item.description: Some Americans are finding that international health insurance costs less than domestic coverage.
